name: arca-marketing-video
description: Brand-driven short-form marketing content kit: seven agent skills (start-here router + brand builder, design guide, carousel generator, storyboard prompt, video prompt, shorts editor) sharing one brand profile + assets. Installable from skills.sh (any SKILL.md agent), via `npx arca-marketing-video`, or by asking your AI agent to fetch the files — see INSTALL.md.
author: aobalitaan
